<!-- Describe the user behaviour or functionality to verify. -->

## Why is this coverage valuable?

<!-- Risk area, regression potential, customer impact, recently changed, etc. -->

<!-- Optional: POM additions, new spec file, tag to use, etc. -->

## Additional context
